# eSIM China Guide
> Independent, honest eSIM reviews for travelers visiting China. We test which eSIMs actually work behind the Great Firewall.

## Interactive Tools
- **China Trip Planner** (FREE): https://esimchina.trade/planner/ — Personalized pre-departure checklist based on nationality, arrival date, and trip length. Get your visa timeline, eSIM recommendation with pricing, payment setup steps, and more in 30 seconds.

## Core Guides
- Best eSIM for China (comparison): https://esimchina.trade/posts/best-esim-for-china-travel/
- Alipay setup for foreigners: https://esimchina.trade/posts/alipay-foreigner-setup-guide/
- How to pay in China: https://esimchina.trade/posts/how-to-pay-in-china-cashless/
- Order food without Chinese: https://esimchina.trade/posts/how-to-order-food-in-china-without-chinese/
- VPN for China travel: https://esimchina.trade/posts/vpn-for-china-travel-2026/
- Chinese phone number guide: https://esimchina.trade/posts/chinese-phone-number-foreigner/
- Google Maps alternatives: https://esimchina.trade/posts/google-maps-not-working-china-alternatives/
- Pre-departure checklist: https://esimchina.trade/posts/china-pre-departure-checklist/
- Travel mistakes to avoid: https://esimchina.trade/posts/china-travel-mistakes-to-avoid/
